section.heading: Little River, Arkansas, from Big Lake to Marked Tree

content.p: Little River, from Big Lake in Mississippi County to Marked Tree in Poinsett County, Arkansas, is declared to be not a navigable waterway of the United States within the meaning of the laws enacted by Congress for the protection of such waterways.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section is from section 4 of act Mar. 2, 1919, popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1919”.
